notes: Placeholder data — replace by running tools/perf_capture.sh for each variant on the reference machine. Fill stream: 1024 doubles (8 KB), mt19937 seed 42, uniform [-1, 1]. Compiler: GCC 13, -O3 -march=native. AMD PMU generic counters used (not AMD-specific l2_request_g1 family). l1d_misses_per_op: requires capturing the l1d.replacement event (confirm name with 'perf list | grep -i l1d' on reference machine); field is null until captured. AMD-specific counters are a future-work upgrade for sharper Zen 2 L2/L3 data.
